detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 智慧與人生 (Wisdom and Life)	開課班級 : 應英三年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 蘇淑品	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
Objectives: The main purpose of this course is to help you learn how to use important Bible wisdom and principles in your life so you can benefit from taking this course. Also, students will learn how to critique and present their own insights and express their own thoughts about the Bible principles intelligently in an academic environment. 


2.教學綱要
Activities: Class, group, paired discussions, topic research, journals, etc. 


3.教科書
2	書名 : The English Bible: Revised Version (Simplified)　　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : 　出版社 : 　版本 :  


無參考書資料。

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Journal: 50% Presentation: 50% 
Attendance: 2 class absences are permitted without penalty, but all assignments are required. Make sure you contact another student for notes, assignments, or hand-outs prior to the next class. Being 10 minutes late for class is regarded as an absence. Late Assignments: All assignments are due on the dates announced. Assignments turned in after the due dates will NOT be accepted. If you miss six weeks of classes, you will fail this class. 
 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG3 健康與福祉、SDG4 優質教育


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：中
